Our Team

At Bratton Physical Therapy, every patient works directly with a licensed physical therapist — never passed off to an aide or tech. Our team brings years of experience and a commitment to personalized, one-on-one care.

PT

Licensed Physical Therapists

Doctorate-level training with specialized certifications in manual therapy, dry needling, and sports rehabilitation.

Meet Our Team

eb1ebcae8e8b.plainText: Jena Bratton, PT Owner & Physical Therapist Jena is the owner and operator of Bratton Physical Therapy of Slidell, Louisiana. She is dedicated to providing excellent one-on-one care in the clinic. Jena is skilled in the treatment of sports injuries, pre and post-surgical rehabilitation for shoulder, elbow, wrist/hand, neck, back, hip, knee and ankle/foot, and injuries to the shoulder, elbow, wrist/hand, neck, back, hip, knee, and ankle/foot.

Meet Our Team

Jena Bratton, PT

Owner & Physical Therapist

Jena is the owner and operator of Bratton Physical Therapy of Slidell, Louisiana. She is dedicated to providing excellent one-on-one care in the clinic. Jena is skilled in the treatment of sports injuries, pre and post-surgical rehabilitation for shoulder, elbow, wrist/hand, neck, back, hip, knee and ankle/foot, and injuries to the shoulder, elbow, wrist/hand, neck, back, hip, knee, and ankle/foot.

01971241cc48.plainText: Jacob D'Angelo Patient Care Coordinator Jacob D'Angelo is the Patient Care Coordinator at Bratton Physical Therapy. He is committed to helping the community that he grew up in become pain free. He loves his family, and he loves his Saints.

2cba3920242b.plainText: Madyson Boehm Rehab Technician Madyson Boehm is a Rehab Technician at Bratton Physical Therapy. She was born and raised on the Northshore and is dedicated to giving back to the area that she knows and loves. When she's not working, she enjoys spending time with her family and her 4 pets!
